flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 21% at Salem State University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (4.3k vs 5.4k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Salem State University fell 15% between 2021 and 2024 (5.0k → 4.3k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Salem State University fell 14% between 2021 and 2024 (41.8% → 36.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Salem State University fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (56.8% → 49.8%).
